name: dark-factory
description: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

maxTasks.description: Maximum tasks per run (circuit breaker threshold)

maxRuntimeMinutes.description: Maximum pipeline runtime in minutes before circuit breaker trips

maxConsecutiveFailures.description: Consecutive task failures before pipeline aborts

humanReviewLevel.description: Autonomy level: 0=full auto, 1=PR approval (default), 2=review checkpoint, 3=spec approval, 4=full supervision

review.featureRounds.description: Maximum adversarial review rounds for feature-tier tasks (cloud)

review.securityRounds.description: Maximum adversarial review rounds for security-tier tasks (cloud)

review.ollamaRoutineRounds.description: Review rounds for routine-tier tasks when running on Ollama

review.ollamaFeatureRounds.description: Review rounds for feature-tier tasks when running on Ollama

review.ollamaSecurityRounds.description: Review rounds for security-tier tasks when running on Ollama

review.preferCodex.description: Use Codex adversarial review when available, fall back to Claude Code

quality.holdoutPercent.description: Percentage of acceptance criteria to withhold for holdout validation

quality.holdoutPassRate.description: Minimum percent of withheld criteria that must be satisfied

quality.mutationTestingTiers.description: Risk tiers that require mutation testing (skip for routine)

quality.coverageMustNotDecrease.description: Block tasks that decrease test coverage

execution.defaultModel.description: Default model for task execution (overridden by complexity classification)

localLlm.enabled.description: Enable Ollama fallback when Anthropic rate limits approach

localLlm.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL — local or remote (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434)

localLlm.model.description: Ollama model tag (auto-pulled on first use if not present on server)

localLlm.useLiteLlm.description: Use LiteLLM proxy for unified routing instead of direct Ollama

localLlm.liteLlmUrl.description: LiteLLM proxy URL (only used if useLiteLlm is true)

dependencies.prMergeTimeout.description: Minutes to wait for dependency PR to merge

observability.auditLog.description: Enable tamper-evident audit logging of all tool uses
